headline: Procter & Gamble vs Colgate-Palmolive: Two Consumer Giants, Two Strategies, One Invests, Other Optimizes
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) and Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) both posted top and bottom line beats in their most recent quarters. PG’s fiscal Q3 2026 leaned on Beauty and broad regional strength. Colgate’s Q1 2026 leaned on Latin America and Hill’s Pet. Same shelf, very different engines. Beauty Powers P&G.
